threats.title: What to Look for in an Exposure Management Platform (And What Most of Them Get Wrong)
threats.summary: Every security team has a version of the same story. The quarter ends with hundreds of vulnerabilities closed. The dashboards are bursting with green. Then someone in a leadership meeting asks: "So, are we actually safer now?" Crickets. threats.title: Critical cPanel Authentication Vulnerability Identified — Update Your Server Immediately
threats.summary: cPanel has released security updates to address a security issue impacting various authentication paths that could allow an attacker to obtain access to the control panel software. The problem affects all currently supported versions, according to an alert released by cPanel on Tuesday. The issue has been addressed in the following versions - 11.110.0.97 11.118.0.63 11.126.0.54 11.132.0.29

threats.title: CISA Adds Actively Exploited ConnectWise and Windows Flaws to KEV
threats.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added two security flaws impacting ConnectWise ScreenConnect and Microsoft Windows to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, based on evidence of active exploitation.
